zh.lifeSummary: 當Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide於大約1035年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德懷可福德時，他的父親Dunlaing O'Caellaide29歲，母親Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig25歲。他於大約1069年與Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1098年在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯盧斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide于大约1035年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德懷可福德时，他的父亲Dunlaing O'Caellaide29岁，母亲Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig25岁。他于大约1069年与Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1098年在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯盧斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Finn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a transferred use of the surname derived in the Middle Ages from the Old Norse personal name Finnr ‘Finn’, used both as a byname and as a short form of various compound names with this first element, or an adoption of the Irish name . The name has recently enjoyed considerable popularity.

nameMeanings.name: mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Maria and Margit , now also used as an independent given name and as an element of compound names such as Mai-Britt, Mai-Lis, Anne-Mai, and Britt-Mai.

en.lifeSummary: When Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide was born about 1035, in Wexford, County Wexford, Ireland, his father, Dunlaing O'Caellaide, was 29 and his mother, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, was 25. He married Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien about 1069, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1098, in Louth, County Louth, Ireland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide est né environ 1035, à Wexford, County Wexford, Irlande, son père, Dunlaing O'Caellaide, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien environ 1069, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1098, à Louth, County Louth, Irlande, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide um 1035 in Wexford, County Wexford, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dunlaing O'Caellaide 29 und seine Mutter Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig 25. Er hat um 1069 in Irland Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1098 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Louth, County Louth, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide è nato il circa 1035 nel Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda, il suo padre, Dunlaing O'Caellaide, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien circa 1069, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1098, nel Louth, County Louth, Irlanda, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaideが約1035年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードウエクスフォードで生まれた時，父Dunlaing O'Caellaideは29歳，母Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigは25歳であった。約1069年にアイルランドでDerbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1098年にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスロウスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide(이)가 대략 1035년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 w스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dunlaing O'Caellaide(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1069년 아일랜드에서 Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1098년 아일랜드 카운티 루스 루스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1035–about 1098: tany ho any amin'ny 1035–tany ho any amin'ny 1098

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda, seu pai, Dunlaing O'Caellaide, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien aproximadamente 1069, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1098, em Louth, County Louth, Irlanda, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide родился около 1035 г. в местности вексфорд, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Dunlaing O'Caellaide было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien около 1069 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1098 г. в местности лоут, коунти лоут, Ирландия в возрасте 65 лет.

sm.about 1035–about 1098: e tusa o le 1035–e tusa o le 1098

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide nació aproximadamente 1035, en Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda, su papá, Dunlaing O'Caellaide, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien aproximadamente 1069, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1098, en Louth, County Louth, Irlanda, a la edad de 65 años.
